word: G1402 - δουλόω - doulóō - doo-lo'-o - Bring into bondage

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δουλόω

- Transliteration: Douloo

- Phonetic: doo-lo'-o

- Definition:

1. to make a slave of, reduce to bondage

2. metaph. give myself wholly to one's needs and service, make myself a bondman to him

- Origin: from G1401

- TDNT entry: 06:39,2

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G1401; to enslave (literally or figuratively): - bring into (be under) bondage X given become (make) servant.
